title: Catching bad LLM behavior: OpenAI's new Deployment Simulation
abstract: Catching bad LLM behavior: OpenAI's new Deployment Simulation delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — the architecture h...
abstract_zh: 伙计们！听说了吗？OpenAI新推出的 **Catching bad LLM behavior: Deployment Simulation** 真是太给力了！你还在为写周报时不小心让AI跑了题、调Bug时被AI整蒙圈而烦恼吗？这个工具能模拟各种场景，提前把那些不靠谱的建议筛一遍。再也不怕AI突然变调皮了，效率直线飙升！赶紧试试吧！
